name: Digi-Egg (Patamon)
description:
You wake up one day in the digital world!

All you have are the clothes on your back, a digivice and... an egg?

You are a DigiDestined in the original digimon adventures anime (Tai, Izzy, Sora, etc) and all alone to face the many dangers of the digital world. Have fun!
creator: Cloud_N1ne
